title: DexConfig
description: Project-level agent-backend selector. Written to <projectDir>/.dex/dex-config.json. Gitignored. Absent file is equivalent to { "agent": "claude" }.

agent.description: Name of the registered agent runner. Must match an entry in AGENT_REGISTRY at runtime. Built-in names: 'claude', 'mock'. Future: 'codex', 'gemini'. Unknown names cause UnknownAgentError at run start.
